era: 1987-1990. Glam Grunge. E=7 -- ambitious, theatrical, heavy, the most fully realized proto-grunge band. Capitol Hill. Stardog/Mercury.
associated_musicians: Temple of the Dog (Chris Cornell tribute)

theory_nodes.concept: Pivot point of the origin arc. Degrees 293-296 trace the complete origin story: Sub Pop wave (293), Green River split (294), Malfunkshun synthesis (295), Mother Love Bone convergence (296). The arc concludes here. Andrew Wood's death on March 19, 1990 directly generated Temple of the Dog and Pearl Jam.
theory_nodes.description: The pivot. Everything after this degree is consequence.

theory_nodes.concept: Apple (1990, Stardog/Mercury): produced by Terry Date, major-label production values, fully realized glam grunge. Released July 13, 1990, four months after Wood's death. 'Crown of Thorns', 'Stardog Champion', 'Stargazer', 'Gentle Groove'. The best Seattle proto-grunge album before Nevermind and Ten.
theory_nodes.description: Apple: the complete statement. Released posthumously.

theory_nodes.concept: Stardog Records (Mercury imprint created specifically for Mother Love Bone): major-label commitment at a scale no other proto-grunge band received. Terry Date as producer. The commercial trajectory that should have resulted in multi-platinum success.
theory_nodes.description: Stardog Records: the major-label arrival for Seattle proto-grunge.

theory_nodes.concept: The complete chain: Green River split 1987 (294) -> Mother Love Bone forms with Wood (296) -> Wood dies March 19 1990 -> Temple of the Dog recorded 1991 (225) -> Pearl Jam Ten August 1991. Four degrees (294-296 + 225) document the complete origin-to-consequence arc.
theory_nodes.description: The chain from Green River to Pearl Jam, documented.

cross_references.relationship: Gossard + Ament origin. The creative fault line's rock-architecture faction left Green River to join Wood. MLB is the direct consequence.
Andrew Wood's origin band. The glam punk synthesis, Bainbridge Island, the voice. Wood left Malfunkshun to form MLB with Gossard + Ament.
Cornell's tribute to Wood. 'Say Hello 2 Heaven'. 'Crown of Thorns' (Wood's own song recorded by Cornell). The musical memorial. Pearl Jam formation context.
Layne Staley + Mike McCready (Pearl Jam, from the GR/MLB lineage). Second-generation cross-reference: AIC world meets the Gossard/Ament world.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7 (Mother Love Bone) + E=8 (Peregrine stoop) = E=15. The pivot point of Seattle grunge pairs with the world's fastest animal at maximum velocity. Both moments of absolute commitment. Both pivot what follows.

milestones: STARDOG RECORDS -- FIRST MAJOR LABEL FOR SEATTLE PROTO-GRUNGE
ANDREW WOOD -- GENERATED TEMPLE OF THE DOG AND PEARL JAM
